/usr/bin/ar qc libblackwell_kernels.a CMakeFiles/blackwell_kernels.dir/src/kernels/gemm.cu.o CMakeFiles/blackwell_kernels.dir/src/kernels/quantize.cu.o CMakeFiles/blackwell_kernels.dir/src/kernels/memory.cu.o CMakeFiles/blackwell_kernels.dir/src/kernels/norm.cu.o CMakeFiles/blackwell_kernels.dir/src/kernels/rope.cu.o CMakeFiles/blackwell_kernels.dir/src/kernels/attention.cu.o CMakeFiles/blackwell_kernels.dir/src/kernels/prefill.cu.o CMakeFiles/blackwell_kernels.dir/src/kernels/decode.cu.o CMakeFiles/blackwell_kernels.dir/src/kernels/cuda_graphs.cu.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libblackwell_kernels.a
